creator: uros@gruber.si
text:
This change upgrades port to the latest. I uncluded a fix from 
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=251924 and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=251926

So both can be closed as duplicates.

I'm working on datadog-integrations upgrade as well.
